title: [FIRRTL][circt-reduce] extmodule-instance-remover crash w/ properties
body:
Consider the following:

``` mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.extmodule @Bar(out a: !firrtl.string)
  firrtl.module @Baz() {
    %a = firrtl.instance Bar @Bar(out a: !firrtl.string)
    %wire = firrtl.wire : !firrtl.string
    firrtl.propassign %wire, %a : !firrtl.string
  }
  firrtl.extmodule @Foo()
}
```

This will crash with the following command:

``` console
# circt-reduce -skip-initial -test='exit 0' extmodule-instance-remover.mlir -include extmodule-instance-remover -o /dev/null
Reading input
Testing input with `exit 0`
Initial module has size 311
Trying reduction `extmodule-instance-remover`
Assertion failed: (isa<To>(Val) && "cast<Ty>() argument of incompatible type!"), function cast, file Casting.h, line 560.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: circt-reduce -skip-initial "-test=exit 0" extmodule-instance-remover.mlir -include extmodule-instance-remover -o /dev/null
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
0  circt-reduce             0x0000000104563c34 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) + 56
1  circt-reduce             0x0000000104561b1c llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() + 172
2  circt-reduce             0x00000001045646dc SignalHandler(int, __siginfo*, void*) + 300
3  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x000000018fd516a4 _sigtramp + 56
4  libsystem_pthread.dylib  0x000000018fd17848 pthread_kill + 296
5  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000018fc209e4 abort + 124
6  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000018fc1fc18 err + 0
7  circt-reduce             0x00000001056b7c2c llvm::StdThreadPool::wait() (.cold.1) + 0
8  circt-reduce             0x000000010489a0d8 circt::firrtl::patterns::AddOfPad::~AddOfPad() + 0
9  circt-reduce             0x00000001054a0f38 (anonymous namespace)::ExtmoduleInstanceRemover::rewrite(circt::firrtl::InstanceOp) + 680
10 circt-reduce             0x00000001044ef0dc execute(mlir::MLIRContext&) + 3988
11 circt-reduce             0x00000001044edebc main + 300
12 dyld                     0x000000018f976b98 start + 6076
zsh: abort      circt-reduce -skip-initial -test='exit 0' extmodule-instance-remover.mlir   -
```
